title: Package Industrial Domestic Sewage Waste Water Treatment Plant Eq
summary: A compact, integrated package wastewater treatment plant for industrial and domestic sewage, using biochemical treatment to produce high-quality effluent suitable for discharge to watercourses, ideal for properties not connected to mains drainage.
bullets: No odours and no internal moving parts
Fully automatic operation for stable performance
Up to 3-year de-sludge intervals on certain models

specs.label: Material
specs.value: Carbon steel with epoxy anticorrosive paint or fiberglass coating
